item.title: Making a Rustic Screwdriver by Hand
item.description: A calm look at forging a functional, rustic screwdriver with traditional shop skills and careful handmade metalwork.

media:content.media:description: A calm look at forging a functional, rustic screwdriver with traditional shop skills and careful handmade metalwork.

item.title: Essential Anvil Tool for the Shop

item.title: Amazing Things Made From Scrap Metal
item.description: A calm look at turning scrap into useful metalwork, with a focus on blacksmithing skill, shaping, and craftsmanship.

item.title: Creating a Rose from Iron, Part 1
item.description: A calm forge project showing the first steps of shaping iron into a rose, with focus on heat, form, and careful metalworking.
